final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing e-commerce landing page hero section mockup for a beauty brand.

Style/medium: needs a clean, bright, airy, feminine aesthetic with floral accents — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a hero section layout with three-column structure (left text column, center model, right product/stat column)
Subject: must include a young East Asian woman smiling and touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of serum
Scene/backdrop: must include purple flowers as floral accents, benefit cards at bottom with icons for "うるおい", "透明感", "使いやすさ"
Lighting/mood: needs a soft lighting atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a soft pink and white direction with purple flower accents — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "LUMEA BEAUTY" logo, navigation links "特徴", "成分", "お客様の声", "使い方", "FAQ", CTA "今すぐ試す", headline "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。", subheadline "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。", feature badges "敏感肌OK", "高保湿", "朝晩使える", bullet points "美容成分をしっかり届ける", "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ", "続けやすいシンプルケア", CTA buttons "初回限定で試してみる >", "成分をチェック >", trust badges "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし", stat cards "満足度 96%", "美容成分 5種配合", "愛用者 12,000人突破", product "moisturizing boost serum"
Constraints: must preserve all UI elements (5 nav links, 3 feature badges, 3 bullet points, 2 CTA buttons, 2 product items, 3 stat cards, 3 benefit cards), pill-shaped badge style, floating white rounded stat cards with gold accents, horizontal white rounded benefit cards with icons
Avoid:
